notes: Durations are remote end-to-end wall-clock timings reported by rch, including sync and compile.

These benchmarks cover one representative external replay verification lane and one trust-score update lane; correctness of the broader reject, quarantine, and fraud-proof matrix stays anchored in the existing operator E2E artifacts.

benchmarks.scenario: successful replay capsule verification remains tractable for an external verifier on the current shared tree
benchmarks.command: env TMPDIR=/data/tmp CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_navyriver_bd1z5a14_match_u2 cargo test -p frankenengine-node --features extended-surfaces test_replay_capsule_match --lib -- --nocapture

benchmarks.scenario: verified trust-score update publication remains tractable on the current shared tree
benchmarks.command: env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_navyriver_bd1z5a14_score cargo test -p frankenengine-node test_events_contain_scoreboard_updated --lib -- --nocapture
